isi.driveFileNames: Ahn Ye Eun - 귀화서, 사혼화 (Dear Life,).mp3
isi.albums: Novel ‘WELCOME TO GUIHWASEO: The Keeper of the Last Spirit Flower’ OST
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Ahn Ye Eun - 귀화서, 사혼화 (Dear Life,)

Romanization

ije gamyeon eonje ona aedalpeun maeumi
kkumeseona boge doelkka guseulpeun maeumi
neoreul chajanaege hayeosseulkka sahonhwayeo

naneun gao tteonagao cheoryanghan maeumi
kkumerado bal didilkka aekkeunneun maeumi
neoreul chajaoge hayeosseulkka
majimak geu huui majimage

ilgop bitkkal neomeoseon saeksaegui nummulgwa
jeo haneurui byeoldeuldo ulgo gal jugeumui hyeongtaedeul
mueoseul hayeodo mekkul su eomneun
geu teumeul anggoseo

saranaendao saranaeya handao
saranghan mangkeum seulpeumeul ssotgo
amureoji aneun deusi
useobondao apeuro naagandao
ijeura haedo ijeul su eomneun
geudae bogopeun dangsin neo

jogeum deo salda watdamyeon dallajyeosseulkka
iri hwangmanghal jul aratdamyeon oji anasseulkka
eotteoge haebwado chaeul su eomneun
geu teumeul naegoseo

sarajusio saranaeeojusio
seulpeohan mangkeum saranghamyeonseo
amureoji aneun deusi
useojusio apeuro naagasio
ijeura haedo itji mothari
geudae bogopeun dangsin neo

itji anayo itji marayo
uri seoroga seororeul


Hangeul

이제 가면 언제 오나 애달픈 마음이
꿈에서나 보게 될까 구슬픈 마음이
너를 찾아내게 하였을까 사혼화여

나는 가오 떠나가오 처량한 마음이
꿈에라도 발 디딜까 애끓는 마음이
너를 찾아오게 하였을까
마지막 그 후의 마지막에

일곱 빛깔 넘어선 색색의 눈물과
저 하늘의 별들도 울고 갈 죽음의 형태들
무엇을 하여도 메꿀 수 없는
그 틈을 안고서

살아낸다오 살아내야 한다오
사랑한 만큼 슬픔을 쏟고
아무렇지 않은 듯이
웃어본다오 앞으로 나아간다오
잊으라 해도 잊을 수 없는
그대 보고픈 당신 너

조금 더 살다 왔다면 달라졌을까
이리 황망할 줄 알았다면 오지 않았을까
어떻게 해봐도 채울 수 없는
그 틈을 내고서

살아주시오 살아내어주시오
슬퍼한 만큼 사랑하면서
아무렇지 않은 듯이
웃어주시오 앞으로 나아가시오
잊으라 해도 잊지 못하리
그대 보고픈 당신 너

잊지 않아요 잊지 말아요
우리 서로가 서로를

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Moon - Fascination

Romanization

Without your love, this world is meaningless to me
A reckless train is running out just aimlessly
Oh your love, it's the only thing in my life
So I, I found myself and let me live in you

Like a rainbow, blooming after rain
Change my life from black and white to color
if it's magic that will disappear when I wake up
I'll Hold your hand, and never let you go

Like a rainbow, blooming after rain
Change my life from black and white to color
if it's magic that will disappear when I wake up
I'll Hold your hand, and never let you go

Without your love, there is no dance of sparkling stars
The deep blue sea, it will stop singing in the end
Oh your love, it's the only way to live
So I, I found myself and let me live in you

Hangeul

Without your love, this world is meaningless to me
A reckless train is running out just aimlessly
Oh your love, it's the only thing in my life
So I, I found myself and let me live in you

Like a rainbow, blooming after rain
Change my life from black and white to color
if it's magic that will disappear when I wake up
I'll Hold your hand, and never let you go

Like a rainbow, blooming after rain
Change my life from black and white to color
if it's magic that will disappear when I wake up
I'll Hold your hand, and never let you go

Without your love, there is no dance of sparkling stars
The deep blue sea, it will stop singing in the end
Oh your love, it's the only way to live
So I, I found myself and let me live in you
